Continue to make incisions until you have separated the brain into its two main hemispheres. • Obtain pins from the table and place them on as many structures as you can identify. Your lab TA will come around and ask you to identify the pins you have placed. *If you are the last table to use this station, be sure to clean off the dissection kits in the lab sink. 60 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

POST-LAB 4 QUESTIONS (3 points) Last Name: _______________________ First Name: _______________________ 1. Which of the following structures are not part of the brainstem? (Circle the appropriate response(s)) (0.5 points) ◦ Cerebral hemisphere ◦ Cerebellum ◦ Pons ◦ Medulla oblongata ◦ Midbrain ◦ Diencephalon 2. What are the three primary parts of the diencephalon? (
